name: Mark Reuss
background: Mark L. Reuss has been President of GM since 2019. He has held numerous roles at GM, including Executive Vice President, Global Product Group and Cadillac.

company_affiliations.name: General Motors Company
company_affiliations.title_or_role: President (Current, 2019–Present); Executive Vice President, Global Product Development, Purchasing and Supply Chain (2013–2019); various other senior roles since 1990.
